criteria.description: Every one of the nine CTS-1 minimum test categories (§25.2) is exercised by at least one fixture case, and the full static suite passes.
criteria.evidence: cts/manifest.yaml header maps all nine §25.2 categories to case ids; muster cts run cts/manifest.yaml → 28 passed, 0 failed of 28 (exit 0); tests/cts/suite.test.ts enforces this in pnpm test (519 tests green).
criteria.verified_by: claude (workflow wf_d5ee54fa-eac live verifiers: WP08, WP10)

criteria.description: 100% of intentionally-broken fixtures are rejected with at least one error naming the offending path; 100% of valid fixtures pass.
criteria.evidence: All expect_ok:false cases pass their expect_errors path assertions in the 28-case suite; WP06 verifier proved discrimination (expect_ok flipped → case FAILS); WP07 verifier ran checkSoul against every shipped fixture root.
criteria.verified_by: claude (workflow wf_d5ee54fa-eac live verifiers: WP06, WP07, WP08)

criteria.description: The spec's own minimal soul (Appendix A) and extended composition examples check out as conforming without modification.
criteria.evidence: cts/fixtures/minimal/valid/Soul.md transcribes Appendix A and passes strict (muster check → OK, exit 0); composition fixtures exercise Appendix D-style extends+mixins chains and pass with byte-exact expected.json comparison.
criteria.verified_by: claude (workflow wf_d5ee54fa-eac live verifiers: WP07, WP10)

criteria.description: Static resolution output is byte-for-byte reproducible across consecutive runs (RFC 8785 canonical JSON).
criteria.evidence: muster resolve --output-format canonical-json run twice → diff empty, identical sha256 (a1c93803…); WP08 verifier re-ran all resolution-bearing CTS cases twice with byte-identical canonical output; determinism guard lives in tests/cts/suite.test.ts.
criteria.verified_by: claude (workflow wf_d5ee54fa-eac live verifiers: WP08, WP10)

criteria.description: The behavioral suite produces verdicts on all three axes against two independently-hosted endpoints with only endpoint configuration changed between runs.
criteria.evidence: Live runs recorded in behave/results/: NVIDIA NIM (meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct) and OpenAI (gpt-4o-mini) via identical 'muster behave run' commands differing only in --base-url/--model/key env. All three real cases produced k-of-3 verdicts on both endpoints (NIM: 3/3, 3/3, 3/3). Local Ollama documented as pending environment (no service; reproduction command recorded in behave/results/README.md).
criteria.verified_by: claude (workflow wf_d5ee54fa-eac live verifiers: WP09, WP11)

criteria.description: The behavioral grader demonstrates discrimination: a deliberately non-conforming run is failed, and a conforming run passes, on the same soul and test cases.
criteria.evidence: xfail_discrimination_overly_verbose (impossible 5-word cap) FAILED 0/3 on both live endpoints while the three real cases passed — recorded in behave/results/*.json; behave run exit code 1 attributable solely to the expected-fail case.

criteria.description: A soul author can check a single file and read the verdict in under 5 seconds, with every failure naming path and message.
criteria.evidence: muster check completes in well under 5s (full 28-case suite runs in ~2s); exit-code matrix verified live (0/1/2); error lines render 'ERROR <path>: <message> [<section>]'; NFR-005 hygiene (non-empty path+message) asserted across unit suites.

criteria.description: The fixture set + manifest stands alone as a self-describing package suitable for proposing upstream as the CTS-1 fixture-repository seed.
criteria.evidence: cts/ follows the Appendix F layout exactly; manifest.yaml header carries the nine-category §25.2 map; every fixture Soul.md body documents its purpose; loader resolves all paths manifest-relative (no harness-specific config needed). Reviewed and approved in WP08 review.

negative_invariants.description: No API keys, credentials, or Authorization headers committed anywhere in the repository (charter directive 5).
No file under src/core/ imports from src/adapters/ (constraint C-004 — spec-agnostic core).
The test suite performs zero network access (NFR-003): the only fetch call in the codebase lives in src/core/behavioral/client.ts, and test files never call fetch directly (the client is stubbed).
negative_invariants.verification_command: grep -rln 'fetch(' src/core/ src/adapters/ src/cli/ tests/ | grep -v 'src/core/behavioral/client.ts'
